_metadata.description: Phase 4 / Sprint 1 / Task 1.2 — UK REIT manual classification. Replaces FMP's universally-empty revenue-product-segmentation / revenue-geographic-segmentation endpoints for LSE-listed REITs (probe-confirmed 2026-06-19). Feeds the C_U1 (propertyType) and C_U2 (geographicScope) signals on the UK REIT scoring family.

schema.propertyType: diversified | industrial | retail | office | residential | healthcare | self_storage | student | social_housing | supermarket | specialty
schema.geographicScope: uk_only — operations entirely in UK | overseas_exposed — material (>10% NAV/rental income) exposure outside UK

_metadata.source: Latest annual report / investor factsheet per company IR page
_metadata._note_on_review: Glenn to QA this list at Sprint 1 Day 1 close. The geographicScope column is the high-judgement piece — propertyType is largely derivable from FMP sub_sector. Disputed entries get a 'reviewed_by_glenn' flag once confirmed.

SGRO.L.name: SEGRO Plc
SGRO.L.notes: Material continental European exposure (~35-40% of portfolio value, primarily Germany, France, Italy, Spain).

BBOX.L.name: Tritax Big Box REIT plc
BBOX.L.notes: UK-only logistics big-box assets (post-UK Commercial Property REIT acquisition).

PHP.L.name: Primary Health Properties PLC
PHP.L.notes: UK + Ireland primary care facilities. Irish exposure ~10-15% of rental income.

LMP.L.name: LondonMetric Property Plc
LMP.L.notes: UK industrial/long-income (post-LXi REIT merger). Treated as industrial-dominant.

SHC.L.name: Shaftesbury Capital PLC
SHC.L.notes: West End London mixed-use (Carnaby, Covent Garden, Soho).

SAFE.L.name: Safestore Holdings plc
SAFE.L.notes: UK + France + Netherlands + Belgium + Spain self-storage. Continental Europe ~20-25% of revenue.

SOHO.L.name: Triple Point Social Housing REIT plc

SREI.L.name: Schroder Real Estate Investment Trust Limited

CLI.L.name: CLS Holdings plc
CLI.L.notes: UK + Germany + France offices. Germany ~45% of portfolio.

RESI.L.name: Residential Secure Income plc
RESI.L.notes: UK shared-ownership / retirement / local authority housing.

SERE.L.name: Schroder European Real Estate Investment Trust Plc
